Types

TemplateSources = tuple[src: string, ast: string, html: string, opcache: string]
Theme {.acyclic.} = ref object
  manifest*: ThemeManifest
  path*: string
  views*, layouts*, partials*: TableRef[string, TimTemplate] = (data: [
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),

      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil)], counter: 0) ## Tables to store templates by their source path
ThemeManifest {.acyclic.} = object
  name*, author*, url*, license*, description*: string
  version*: semver.Version
The manifest for a Tim theme, defined in theme.yaml in the theme directory 
TimEngine {.acyclic.} = ref object
  sourceType*: TimSourceType ## The source type of the templates, either from the filesystem
                             ## or embedded in the binary
  config*: PackageConfig     ## The configuration for the Tim Engine, including source and output paths, target source, etc.
  userScript*: UserScript    ## A `UserScript` object that allows users to define custom foreign procedures
  globalData*: JsonNode      ## Global data available in all templates under the `$app` variable
  depResolver*: FileResolver ## A `FileResolver` to manage template dependencies and hot reloading
  enableThemes*: bool ## Whether to enable theme support. If true, the engine will look for themes in the
                      ## `themes` directory of the installation path and load the active theme's templates.
  themes*: TableRef[string, Theme] = (data: [(0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil)], counter: 0) ## A table to store themes by their name
  activeTheme*: Theme        ## The currently active theme, if any
  activeThemeName*: string   ## The name of the currently active theme, used for initialization before loading themes
  views*, layouts*, partials*: TableRef[string, TimTemplate] = (data: [
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil),
      (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil), (0, "", nil)], counter: 0) ## Tables to store templates by their source path

The main Tim Engine object. Holds the configuration and the templates.

It must be initialized with newTim()

TimEngineError = object of CatchableError
TimSourceType = enum
  timSourceFilesystem, timSourceEmbedded
TimTemplate {.acyclic.} = ref object
  id*: string                ## unique identifier of the template (based on path hash)
  sources*: TemplateSources ## the source paths related to the template, including the
                            ## # original source path, the cached AST path,
  templateType*: TimTemplateType
  dependencies*: seq[string] = [] ## a sequence of source paths that the template depends on (imports/includes)
  embeddedCode*: Option[string]
Object representing a Tim template 
TimTemplateType = enum
  ttView = "views", ttLayout = "layouts", ttPartial = "partials"
Type of the Tim template 
UserScript {.acyclic.} = ref object

Procs

proc addProc(userScript: UserScript; name: string;
             params: seq[TempParamDef] = @[]; returnTy: TypeKind;
             impl: ForeignProc = nil; exportSym = true) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Add a foregin function to the UserScript. 
proc compileCode(view, layout: TimTemplate; localData, globalData: JsonNode): Value {.
    ...raises: [IndexDefect, ValueError, KeyError, TimEngineError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Compile a view and layout into HTML without evaluating them. This can be used for debugging or for generating the HTML output without executing any code in the templates. 
proc compileCode(view: TimTemplate; localData, globalData: JsonNode): Value {.
    ...raises: [IndexDefect, ValueError, KeyError, TimEngineError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Compile a view into HTML without evaluating it. 
proc declareGlobals(compiler: CodeGen) {.
    ...raises: [CodeGenError, ValueError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc getLayout(engine: TimEngine; key: string): TimTemplate {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a layout template by its name (with/without extension). 
proc getPartial(engine: TimEngine; key: string): TimTemplate {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a partial template by its name (with/without extension). 
proc getTemplateByPath(engine: TimEngine; path: string): TimTemplate {.
    ...raises: [TimEngineError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a Tim template by its source path. Returns a TimTemplate object with the template type set to ttView. 
proc getThemeLayout(engine: TimEngine; key: string): TimTemplate {.
    ...raises: [TimEngineError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a layout template from the active theme by its name (with/without extension). 
proc getThemePartial(engine: TimEngine; key: string): TimTemplate {.
    ...raises: [TimEngineError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a partial template from the active theme by its name (with/without extension). 
proc getThemeView(engine: TimEngine; key: string): TimTemplate {.
    ...raises: [TimEngineError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a view template from the active theme by its name (with/without extension). 
proc getView(engine: TimEngine; key: string): TimTemplate {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a view template by its name (with/without extension). 
proc injectScript(userScript: UserScript; code: string) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Inject a code string into the UserScript. 
proc interpret(view, layout: TimTemplate; localData, globalData: JsonNode): Value {.
    ...raises: [IndexDefect, ValueError, KeyError, TimEngineError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

Evaluate a view within a layout and return the final HTML output.

Templates are evaluated in the context of the provided localData and globalData, which are available in the templates under the $this and $app variables, respectively.

The view template is evaluated first, and its output is passed to the layout template as the content to be rendered within the layout.

proc interpret(view: TimTemplate; localData, globalData: JsonNode): Value {.
    ...raises: [IndexDefect, ValueError, KeyError, TimEngineError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Evaluate a view without a layout and return the final HTML output. This can be used for rendering partials or standalone views. 
proc newTemplate(id: string; templateType: TimTemplateType;
                 sources: TemplateSources): TimTemplate {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a half-initialized TimTemplate object with the given id, type and source path 
proc newTim(globalData: JsonNode = nil): TimEngine {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Initialize a new Tim Engine instance from a preloaded table of templates.

Usually used in embedded mode, where the templates are embedded into the binary as a table of source paths to template content strings.

proc newTim(src, output, basepath: string; target = TargetSource.tsHtml;
            globalData: JsonNode = newJObject();
            enableThemes: static bool = false; activeThemeName: string = ""): TimEngine
Initialize a new Tim Engine instance.
  • src: the source directory containing the templates
  • output: the output directory where the rendered files will be saved
  • basepath: the base path to resolve the src and output paths
  • target: the target source for transpilation (default: HTML)
proc parseHook(p: var YamlParser; v: var semver.Version) {.
    ...raises: [ParseError, ValueError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc precompile(engine: TimEngine) {....raises: [OSError, IOError, KeyError,
    LibraryError, SslError, Exception, OpenParserJsonError, ValueError,
    KeyError, ValueError, IOError, ParseError, Exception, OpenParserJsonError,
    ValueError, ParseError, IOError, TimLexerError, CodeGenError, TimEngineError], tags: [
    WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ExecIOEffect,
    ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteEnvEffect], forbids: [].}
proc precompile(engine: TimEngine; views, layouts, partials: EmbeddedTemplates;
                globalData: JsonNode = nil) {....raises: [TimEngineError, OSError,
    IOError, KeyError, LibraryError, SslError, Exception, OpenParserJsonError,
    ValueError, TimLexerError, CodeGenError], tags: [WriteDirEffect,
    ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect,
    RootEffect, WriteEnvEffect], forbids: [].}
Precompile a set of embedded templates and return a Tim Engine instance. 
proc precompileEmbeddedTemplate(engine: TimEngine; tpl: TimTemplate;
                                pkgr: Packager; data: JsonNode = nil;
                                vfsMap: TableRef[string, string] = nil): bool {.
    discardable, ...raises: [TimLexerError, ValueError, Exception, IOError,
                          KeyError, CodeGenError, OSError],
    tags: [RootEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
Precompile a Tim template from embedded code. This is used when the templates are embedded into the binary as strings, and we need to compile them into scripts. Optionally pass a vfsMap containing all available embedded templates for include/import resolution. 
proc precompileTemplate(engine: TimEngine; tpl: TimTemplate; pkgr: Packager;
                        data: JsonNode = nil): bool {.discardable, ...raises: [
    TimLexerError, ValueError, Exception, IOError, KeyError, CodeGenError,
    OSError, IOError, ValueError, KeyError, Exception, OSError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
proc registerTemplate(engine: TimEngine; src: string): TimTemplate {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Register a new Tim template by its source path.

This is used during the precompilation process to create a new Tim template and register it in the engine's tables based on its type (view, layout or partial)

Iterators

iterator getLayouts(engine: TimEngine): TimTemplate {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Iterator to get all layout templates 
iterator getPartials(engine: TimEngine): TimTemplate {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Iterator to get all partial templates 
iterator getViews(engine: TimEngine): TimTemplate {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Iterator to get all view templates
